source_boundary.review_result: No verified Binance.US native batch-cancel endpoint maps losslessly to the shared batch_cancel_orders request model.
source_boundary.excluded_alias: Do not reuse Binance.com batch-order routes for Binance.US without a Binance.US-specific official endpoint audit.

reason: Binance.US Spot currently exposes single-order and symbol-wide cancel paths in this adapter profile; native batch cancel remains unsupported for the shared gateway boundary.
